title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Adani Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Adani Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Adani Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adani Enterprises:
Adani Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises!
